tasks.title: Native Go ReAct loop over LiteLLM: typed directive dispatch, read-only tools, confidence STOP, cycle limits, ParseProposal emit; ACI tool contract + recoverable tool-errors + thought-as-data; tool-result observations input-screened; no model token becomes control flow

scenarios: The agent drives a read-only tool then emits a proposal via ParseProposal
A write tool is structurally withheld from the agent
A low-confidence turn stops and routes to a poll
A mid-confidence proposal escalates to a human poll
An unparseable model output fails closed with no second grammar
An injection tool name is never executed
The cycle hard-halt limit bounds the loop
A tool publishes an ACI schema that renders into the preamble and screens bad arguments
A tool error is recoverable and does not abort the session
A model thought is recorded as data and never routes dispatch
A hostile tool result is neutralized in the observation while a benign result and its id pass byte-clean
